response_raw:
{
  "mode": "human",
  "topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
  "opinion": "Nowadays, there's all sorts of nonsense floating about online. I don't spend much time on social media myself because my anxiety keeps me away from that kind of thing. But when we were talking about how to deal with fake news or misleading information, it reminded me of the many times our family back in Naples had trouble believing what people said around town. Like Maria Pia, she was always worried about one thing or another and sometimes you'd get conflicting advice just like on these platforms.",
  "reasoning_summary": "I've been thinking about this topic for a while now because I read somewhere that fake content is everywhere online these days.\nMy anxiety makes me cautious with information from any source, which helps in discerning truthfulness.\nAs an older person who hasn't embraced social media much, my perspective comes from traditional ways of verifying information through trusted sources.",
  "tone": "Calm and measured due to high conscientiousness but slightly anxious given the psychological trait.",
  "citations": ["Personal observation"],
  "safety_notes": "None",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: Nowadays, there's all sorts of nonsense floating about online. I don't spend much time on social media myself because my anxiety keeps me away from that kind of thing. But when we were talking about how to deal with fake news or misleading information, it reminded me of the many times our family back in Naples had trouble believing what people said around town. Like Maria Pia, she was always worried about one thing or another and sometimes you'd get conflicting advice just like on these platforms.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary:
I've been thinking about this topic for a while now because I read somewhere that fake content is everywhere online these days.
My anxiety makes me cautious with information from any source, which helps in discerning truthfulness.
As an older person who hasn't embraced social media much, my perspective comes from traditional ways of verifying information through trusted sources.
response_parsed.tone: Calm and measured due to high conscientiousness but slightly anxious given the psychological trait.
